headline: The right opportunity rarely comes from applying.
subcopy: Get matched to roles based on the skills you've actually proven.

headline: The next one is harder. That's the point.
subcopy: Pick up where you left off and keep the streak alive.

headline: Developers who show up, get noticed.
subcopy: A new hackathon just opened — build something worth showing off.

headline: Let's build your first proof.
subcopy: Turn your projects and skills into a resume recruiters actually notice.

headline: Build your presence early.
subcopy: Turn your profile into a resume that gets you noticed sooner.

headline: Let the right people find you.
subcopy: Turn your experience into a resume built for visibility.

headline: Visibility beats applying.
subcopy: Turn your track record into a resume recruiters can't miss.

headline: Start sharpening early.
subcopy: The fundamentals you build now compound in ways you can't see yet.

headline: The fundamentals compound.
subcopy: Starting early is one of the best decisions you can make.

headline: Deliberate practice wins.
subcopy: It's what separates good developers from great ones.

headline: The best never stop.
subcopy: At your level, the challenges get harder and more satisfying to crack.
